summary: Created app/src/lib/media/imageProcessing.ts with processImage(blob): Promise<ProcessedImage> — main-thread only, using OffscreenCanvas with HTMLCanvasElement fallback. Implements resize-to-MAX_EDGE, WebP re-encode (EXIF stripped), thumbnail at THUMB_MAX_EDGE, blurhash via the blurhash package (32x32 sample, [4,3] components), and SHA-256 via crypto.subtle. ImageTooLargeError thrown before any canvas work when input exceeds MAX_INPUT_BYTES. Chunked yields between heavy steps. Added 12 unit tests in Node environment with inline stubs for OffscreenCanvas/createImageBitmap and webcrypto polyfill. Added 'blurhash' to app/package.json dependencies.
